bio:
Welcome to my practice at Hazelwood Clinic. I'm Dr. Stephen Quigley, a Clinical Psychologist based in Ennis, dedicated to providing compassionate, evidence-based support tailored to each client's unique journey. With over 14 years of experience across diverse settings and specialised training in CBT, EMDR, Internal Family Systems, and Psychodynamic Psychotherapy, I believe in meeting you where you are and creating a safe, collaborative space where you feel truly heard and understood.

My approach draws from modern attachment theory and positive psychology, ensuring that every session is grounded in both scientific rigour and genuine care. Whether you're navigating mood disorders, anxiety, trauma, neurodiversity-related challenges, or exploring identity and relationships, I'm here to support you with warmth and expertise. As a Chartered Clinical Psychologist committed to continuous learning, I offer both face-to-face and online sessions, making professional psychological support accessible when you need it most.
